skillTree.localised_description: Though he cannot hear a thing, Gawker provides the stiff, upright support Tom needs to achieve the perfect angle for their shared long-range observations. Together, they glide through the shadows in a bond of mutual satisfaction, hovering over their targets until they find the ideal moment to deliver a heavy, overhead pounding.

attributes.bullet_text: This unit frightens all enemy units, reducing their leadership when nearby. It is also immune to fear. Fear penalties do not stack.
This unit can hide in forests until enemy units get too close.

Undead units cannot be routed, but take damage when their Leadership is broken.
	
	Undead units also have:
	 Fear and Terror Immunity
	
	Undead units may also have their hit points restored by special characters such as the Vampire Counts Necromancer.

skillTree.localised_description: "It's a rabbit's foot. A rabbit. No… Oh never mind - it brings me luck. It does! Trust me!"
The impact is uh... Sizeable...
For a blind ghoul, Peeping Tom reacts much faster than anyone expected, pulling out before the heavy pounding begins.
Inspired by the way Gawker and Tom handle their business, the crew is trained to seek and exploit openings by utilizing heavier explosive payloads that ensure a spectacular if not messy finish.
Tom hasn't closed his eyes in years, and he doesn't see why the crew should either.
Tom signals the crew of the Flaccid Fury for a massive, unbridled release of ordinance, blanketing the terrain in a sticky barrage of necro-fluid coated cannon shot.
Tom has a sixth sense for where an enemy's defenses are thinnest, ensuring that Deck Droppers always find their way to the enemies unprotected rear.

effects.description:
Enable Attribute: "Stalk" For All Deck Dropper Units
	(Hero's army)

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can move hidden in any terrain.

effects.description:
Enable Attribute: "Vanguard Deployment" For All Deck Dropper Units
	(Hero's army)

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can deploy outside the deployment zone.

skillTree.localised_description: Tom has spent a lifetime mastering the art of the uninvited entry, but it is his uncanny ability to linger in a target's blind spot is what makes him truly dangerous.

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit remains hidden while firing.
If this unit can hide at its current location it will not be spotted until the enemy is very close.

skillTree.localised_description: Once Tom finds the perfect opening from his bird’s-eye view, he lets go of a heavy payload that flattens anything unlucky enough to be in its impact radius.

ui_effects.localised_text: Leaves a pool of fire on strike zone

skillTree.localised_description: "Yes, they’re from the east. Annoying, yet useful - their hides, particularly…"
If it's not tacked down, this one'll 'ave it and kill anyone who gets in their way.

effects.description: Post battle chance of stealing a magic item: +5%
Post battle chance of stealing a magic item: +10%
Post battle chance of stealing a magic item: +15%

skillTree.localised_description: "If all else fails, shoot it squarely and dive into the drink!"

effects.description: Ability number of uses: +1 for "More Powder!"

skillTree.localised_description: …literally, though they never miss.
…because once they're in the water, you want your targets to stay there… forever.
"Now listen up an' listen good… here be the plan…"
Death is always just a shot away.
"It's got a few secret ingredients. No, I won't tell you what they are, but the results will speak for themselves."
"Get more ammo up here, NOW!!!!!!!!"
What the enemy cannot see, it cannot hit. What the enemy cannot see, it cannot survive.
A clever arrangement of lenses makes the target seem just that bit closer.
The crew have noticed that Peeping Tom has an uncanny talent for timing, firing specialized rounds with persistent tracking that ensures the big moment is never missed.
Those in the army can find succour or be replenished by the power of this champion.

effects.description: Replenish Troops action: Replenishment rate is increased by an additional 3%
Replenish Troops action: Replenishment rate is increased by an additional 6%
Replenish Troops action: Replenishment rate is increased by an additional 9%

skillTree.localised_description: The sight of this warrior, their stature, import or infamy, can have a calming effect.

effects.description: Spread Control action: Control is modified by an additional 1
Spread Control action: Control is modified by an additional 2
Spread Control action: Control is modified by an additional 3

skillTree.localised_description: "If they know I'm coming then more's the better!"

effects.description: Assault Garrison action: Additional 5% casualties inflicted
Assault Garrison action: Additional 15% casualties inflicted
Assault Garrison action: Additional 30% casualties inflicted

skillTree.localised_description: A skilled assassin is a cold-hearted killer and merciless murderer.
Lying in wait, experienced and patient, striking when the foe least expects.

effects.description: Assault Units action: Additional 3% casualties inflicted
Assault Units action: Additional 8% casualties inflicted
Assault Units action: Additional 15% casualties inflicted

skillTree.localised_description: An expert in their craft, this Hero knows all the mistakes that can be made and how to best avoid making them.

attributes.bullet_text: This unit frightens all enemy units, reducing their leadership when nearby. It is also immune to fear. Fear penalties do not stack.
This unit can hide in forests until enemy units get too close.

Undead units cannot be routed, but take damage when their Leadership is broken.
	
	Undead units also have:
	 Fear and Terror Immunity
	
	Undead units may also have their hit points restored by special characters such as the Vampire Counts Necromancer.

items.colour_text: This shriveled, leathery nub is said to be the desiccated digit of an ancient Slann Mage Priest, though the crew think its peculiar shape and salty musk suggest a more disturbing origin. When Tom licks the relic, he is flooded with psychoactive visions revealing the vulnerabilities of every army within miles. The crew tries desperately not to watch him handle the nub, but they all know that when Tom uses the shriveled fetish, a heavy pounding is soon to follow.

effects.description:
Attribute: Revealed
	(enemy armies in local province)

related_attributes.bullet_text:
This unit is permanently visible to the enemy, regardless of line of sight.
	
	Revealed units are not affected by the following attributes:
	 Hide Forest
	 Stalk
	 Unspottable

effects.description:
Missile resistance: -15% for all units
	(enemy armies in local province)

Missile block chance: -15%
	(enemy armies in local province)

items.colour_text: The Caralho is a towering, rigid monstrosity of a war-blimp, born from Peeping Tom’s feverish obsession with achieving the ultimate vantage point. Constructed from the massive, wrinkled remains of what the Lookout claims is a salvaged Cathayan Sky-Sack and held aloft by experimental engines that Tom acquired from the ruins of Yin-Yin’s fleet, the vessel is as impressive in its magnitude as it is unsettling in its design.

attributes.bullet_text: This unit can move hidden in any terrain.
If this unit can hide at its current location it will not be spotted until the enemy is very close.
This unit remains hidden while firing.

backgroundSkills.localised_description: Fresh recruits aboard the Flaccid Fury are told Tom once spotted a High Elf fleet from three oceans away. When asked how, considering he has cataracts the size of doubloons and his head is like that of a rotting sea bass, he simply licked the shriveled toe fetish around his neck, closed his eyes and and whispered: "They're wearing silk." No one has intentionally spoken to him since.

related_attributes.bullet_text: This unit can move hidden in any terrain.
